summary: Iteration 4 testing complete. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend features verified: Logo in header/footer, ChatPanel in paziente/terapeuta dashboards, booking flow with stato='confermato', Daily.co room creation, email sending via Resend.
critical_code_review_comments: DatiFiscaliStep auto-compute CF works correctly - debounced 500ms, shows 'Calcolato automaticamente' indicator
ChatPanel polling every 5s - consider WebSocket for real-time messaging in future
APScheduler reminders are in-memory (not persistent) - acceptable for MVP but consider persistent job store for production
seed_data_creation: Test messages created with TEST_ prefix during chat testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 features fully tested: (1) /api/utils/compute-cf works for Italian (Milano) and estero (Brasile), returns error for Altro/Preferisco non specificare genders. (2) /api/conversazioni returns therapists for paziente and patients for terapeuta based on confermato/completato appointments. (3) /api/messaggi GET/POST work for both roles. (4) /api/public/prenota creates appointment with stato='confermato', creates Daily.co room, sends confirmation emails via Resend, schedules reminders via APScheduler. (5) Logo (/assets/logo.png) appears in PublicLayout header and footer. (6) ChatPanel integrated in PazienteDashboard and TerapistaDashboard with conversation list, message display, and send functionality. (7) DatiFiscaliStep auto-computes CF when nome+cognome+data_nascita+genere+luogo_nascita are filled (debounced 500ms).

test_results.backend_compute_cf_italian: PASS - returns valid 16-char CF for Milano
test_results.backend_compute_cf_estero: PASS - returns valid CF for Brasile
test_results.backend_conversazioni_paziente: PASS - returns therapists with confermato/completato appointments
test_results.backend_conversazioni_terapeuta: PASS - returns patients with confermato/completato appointments
test_results.backend_messaggi_get: PASS - returns messages, marks as read
test_results.backend_messaggi_send_paziente: PASS - paziente can send to terapeuta
test_results.backend_messaggi_send_terapeuta: PASS - terapeuta can send to paziente
test_results.backend_email_sending: PASS - logs show EMAIL SENT entries
test_results.frontend_booking_flow: PASS - review → auth → payment steps work

mocked_apis.Payment: MOCKED - Nexi XPay not integrated, mock card form shown
mocked_apis.Note: Email sending is REAL via Resend (only to verified emails in free tier)
